Headline: #70 Division Temporary Reroute near Division/Central
ShortDescription: 70 Division buses temp. rerouted : due to, fire department activity near Division/Central.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#70 Division buses temp. rerouted : due to, fire department activity near Division/Central.

Eastbound buses will operate via Division, Austin, Augusta, Laramie and Division including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses will operate via Division, Laramie, Augusta and Austin.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #85 Central Temporary Reroute at Division/Central
ShortDescription: 85 Central  buses are temporarily rerouted via Central, North Avenue, Austin, Augusta and Central due to, fire department activity near Division/Central.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85 Central  buses are temporarily rerouted via Central, North Avenue, Austin, Augusta and Central due to, fire department activity near Division/Central.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #52 Kedzie buses Temporary Reroute at Kedzie/Roosevelt
ShortDescription: #52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near Kedzie/Roosevelt.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#52 Kedzie buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Kedzie, Roosevelt, California, Ogden and Kedzie, then will resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Kedzie/Roosevelt.
